programmes.show_description: The Murder Of Ellie Gould. When a 17-year-old girl was attacked and murdered in her Wiltshire home, her killer was until the day before her boyfriend. What made him turn killer? S2, Ep1
The Murder Of Jodie Chesney. A 17-year-old girl was out with friends in an East London park when she was stabbed by unknown assailants. Fatally, it was a case of mistaken identity. S2, Ep2
Ticket To Murder. In Dalton, Georgia, a convenience store employee is stabbed at work. Security footage reveals a disturbing revelation about the killer's identity. S8, Ep15
I Will Follow. In 2016, a young mum of two is brutally shot to death in her home. When police arrive on the scene, they suspect someone close to the victim. S8, Ep16

Unlikely Sources. How baffling crimes have been solved through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles and other seemingly meaningless objects. S3, Ep13
Not Forgotten. A man risks everything to find his sister's killer - can a sympathetic detective with a great theory help him? Plus, a sexual predator is getting away with murder. S6, Ep10
Voice of Terror. In the late 1970s, the FBI had knowledge of anti-Castro terrorists operating in the US. Then, a new group appeared, more violent than their predecessors. S7, Ep1
Dangerous Case. In the late '70s, a terrorist group is suspected of setting off bombs in major US cities. Their goal: to bring attention to the Puerto Rican independence movement. S7, Ep2
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep3
Sex and the Married Man. A married man starts a forbidden relationship with his 14-year-old babysitter. When his wife finds out, he will stop at nothing to keep his affair secret. S2, Ep2
Love And Lies In Idyllwild. On June 6th, 2020, in the Idyllwild community of California, Dia Abrams tells her partner she will feed the horses and is never seen or heard from again. S11, Ep3
Captured On Camera. A 22-year-old nursing assistant vanishes. When police check the local CCTV footage, they discover that Carlesha Freeland-Gaither was abducted right on camera. S3, Ep1
Rahim Mohammadi. The shocking discovery of 80-year-old Lea Adri-Soejoko's body in a shed unravels a tragic story. Detectives and her family recount the steps that led to her murder. S1, Ep2
An Open Relationship. On New Year's Eve, Brent Cotta's popular wife, Cassie, mysteriously vanishes. The discovery of a shallow grave leads to the emergence of a horrific truth. S4, Ep2
Looks Can Kill. Rebecca Thudin was a successful, driven woman who seemed to live the perfect life. But, after meeting an older man at the gym, her life takes a dramatic turn. S4, Ep6
Last Stop. When 13-year-old Tabitha Tuders vanishes, police suspect she's a runaway. But disturbing circumstances behind her disappearance leaves her family desperate for the truth. S9, Ep8
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep4
No Place Like Home. A young professional is murdered in her apartment in Orlando. Detectives turn to CCTV footage to solve the case and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice. S6, Ep8
The Final Cut. After the stabbing of hairstylist-to-the-stars Fabio Sementilli, a trail of passion and greed exposes a killer who sends shockwaves as far as Canada. S9, Ep12
Feared Silent. After a call on Friday the 13th, José Herran vanishes. As police dig in, they find a town where fear reigns, pain is ritual, and horror thrives. S1, Ep6
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep3
The Murder Of Michael Moss. When a 15-year-old boy was lured to a Liverpool park, tortured and left for dead, it was dubbed the 'Reservoir Dogs' murder. His three killers were 15. S2, Ep3
The Murder Of Sophie Lancaster. Sophie Lancaster was attacked and brutally beaten by a gang of teenagers who targeted her and her boyfriend just for being different. S2, Ep5
Comply Or Die. In North Carolina, a convenience store worker is killed, part of a pattern of armed robberies. Police race to arrest the robber before he kills again. S8, Ep17
Black Widow. When a young man with a developmental disability vanishes, his legal guardian frantically searches for him. Police turn to CCTV to find him. S8, Ep18

True Crime. Crime writers know as much about crime as any crime-fighter - or criminal. They can provide as near a first-person account of a murder as is possible. S3, Ep14
Tainted Blood. Police rely on a drop of blood to determine a missing person's fate. Plus, when a woman is hit by a train, is a killer covering his tracks? S6, Ep12
The Great Philby Mob War. Three armed men attack a man and flee the scene. Authorities are unable to identify the assailants but are convinced it was the work of the Mafia. S7, Ep3
The Shootist. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep4
Chris Parker. Experts analyse a man's deception following the Manchester Arena terror attack. Police tapes expose a man who murdered his wife and hid her body in the freezer. S3, Ep2
Cold Cases. Investigates murder cases that took a decade or more to solve and how detectives can solve such cases when clues have become scarce. S4, Ep8
Family Plots. Sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed: when murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots. S4, Ep9
Blood Money. Some people murder for love, others for money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every forensic clue pay off. S4, Ep10
Toddler's Terrible Tale. In Twinsburg, Ohio, Charlene Puffenbarger's three-year-old son is the only witness to her brutal murder. An unexpected source leads them to the killer. S5, Ep3
Irreplaceable Gems. When an Ohio couple is found dead in their ransacked home, detectives turn to the community for help. Can investigators uncover the truth of what happened? S5, Ep4
Killer On The Res. When someone stabs Trina Langenbrunner and leaves her on a road in Minnesota, her community and law enforcement work together for over 12 years to find her killer. S5, Ep9
The Gravel Pit Murders. In Howard City, Michigan, detectives investigate a night of horror that ends with the shooting of beloved couple Robert and Norma Bean in a gravel pit. S5, Ep7
Hunting A Killer. In rural Missouri, a hunter is found murdered in his car near the popular deer trails. Was this a hunting accident gone wrong, or something more sinister? S5, Ep2
Field Of Bad Dreams. The grotesque murder of a beloved elderly citizen, Betsy Ball, shatters the quiet farm community of Vinton, Ohio. S5, Ep12
She Had No Name. A young woman vanishes into a patrol car. For 35 years, she's a Jane Doe, until hypnosis reveals a clue that unmasks a predator hiding in plain sight. S1, Ep4

programmes.show_name: New: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: Lie, Cheat, Kill. As a hurricane hits Houston, a mother disappears. With resources strained and leads thin, authorities call in Texas Ranger Jim Holland for help. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Murder Of Caroline Crouch A Faking It Special
programmes.show_description: A pilot sweeps a young woman off her feet. But after their child is born, tragedy strikes. Experts expose the truth.
